name: confidential-send-stellar
description: Real-World ZK on Stellar — confidential verified payment (Groth16/BLS12-381 on Soroban). Standalone, testable without the closed product.
author: StellarHub

scripts.test:contracts: H=$(rustc -vV | sed -n 's/host: //p'); for c in groth16-verifier zk-verified-payment zk-confidential-transfer; do cargo test --manifest-path contracts/$c/Cargo.toml --target $H || exit 1; done
